skills.name: algorithmic-art
skills.description: Create generative art using p5.js with seeded randomness so every render is reproducible. Useful for procedural posters, motion-style stills, and artistic frame studies.

skills.name: canvas-design
skills.description: Create beautiful visual art in PNG and PDF documents using design philosophy and aesthetic principles for posters, illustrations, and static pieces.

skills.name: fal-3d
skills.description: Generate 3D models from text or images via fal.ai. Useful for game assets, AR previews, product mockups, and concept sculpting.

skills.name: fal-generate
skills.description: Generate images and videos using fal.ai AI models. Production-grade catalogue covering Flux, SDXL, ideogram, and other community-hosted endpoints.

skills.name: fal-image-edit
skills.description: AI-powered image editing with style transfer, background removal, object removal, and inpainting via fal.ai hosted models.

skills.name: fal-realtime
skills.description: Real-time and streaming AI image generation via fal.ai. Suited for moodboard exploration, draft variations, and rapid creative iteration.

skills.name: fal-restore
skills.description: Restore and fix image quality — deblur, denoise, fix faces, and restore old documents using fal.ai's hosted restoration models.

skills.name: fal-train
skills.description: Train custom AI models (LoRA) on fal.ai for personalized image generation tailored to a brand, character, or style.

skills.name: fal-tryon
skills.description: Virtual try-on — see how clothes look on a person via fal.ai's hosted try-on models. Useful for ecommerce, lookbooks, and styling experiments.

skills.name: fal-upscale
skills.description: Upscale and enhance image and video resolution using AI super-resolution models hosted on fal.ai.

skills.name: fal-vision
skills.description: Analyze images — segment objects, detect, run OCR, describe, and answer visual questions via fal.ai vision models.

skills.name: full-page-screenshot
skills.description: Capture full-page screenshots of web pages via Chrome DevTools Protocol with zero dependencies. Useful for portfolios, case studies, and audit reports.

skills.name: gif-sticker-maker
skills.description: Convert photos into animated GIF stickers in Funko Pop / Pop Mart style via the MiniMax API. Useful for personalized chat stickers and avatar packs.

skills.name: hatch-pet
skills.description: Create, repair, validate, preview, and package Codex-compatible animated pet spritesheets from character art, screenshots, generated images, or visual references. Use when a user wants to hatch a Codex pet, create a custom animated pet, or build a built-in pet asset with an 8x9 atlas, transparent unused cells, row-by-row animation prompts, QA contact sheets, preview videos, and pet.json packaging. This skill composes the installed $imagegen system skill for visual generation and uses bundled scripts for deterministic spritesheet assembly.

skills.name: image-enhancer
skills.description: Improve image and screenshot quality by enhancing resolution, sharpness, and clarity for professional presentations and documentation.

skills.name: imagegen
skills.description: Generate and edit images using OpenAI's Image API for project assets — UI mockups, icons, illustrations, social cards, and visual references.

skills.name: imagen
skills.description: Generate images using Google Gemini's image generation API for UI mockups, icons, illustrations, and visual assets.

skills.name: pixelbin-media
skills.description: Generate and edit images and videos with an 85+ API portfolio and build visually appealing website pages via Pixelbin.

skills.name: replicate
skills.description: Discover, compare, and run AI models using Replicate's API. Strong fit for image, audio, and video generation pipelines that swap models frequently.

skills.name: screenshot
skills.description: Capture desktop, app windows, or pixel regions across OS platforms. Useful for marketing screenshots, design reviews, and bug reports.

skills.name: screenshots-marketing
skills.description: Generate marketing screenshots with Playwright. Useful for landing-page hero shots, App Store screenshots, and changelog visuals.

skills.name: slack-gif-creator
skills.description: Create animated GIFs optimized for Slack with validators for size constraints and composable animation primitives.

skills.name: venice-image-edit
skills.description: Image edits, upscaling, and background removal via the Venice.ai API.
